Order.First Time Key: Label ANY order key with FT_keyname to make it so it only happens once, very usefull for set ups.
Order.place: Places a unit by specifying [slot_number, placement_index] where placement_index is 0-based.
Order.place_<mode>_<priority>: Places a unit with mode ('a' = auto-upgrade, anything else = normal) and a priority value from 1-5.
Order.setp_X: Sets a unit's priority by pressing R X times on the selected unit.
Order.upgrade: Upgrades a unit using [slot_number, upgrade_index] where upgrade_index is 0-based.
Order.sell: Sells a unit using [slot_number, placement_index] to identify which placed unit to remove.
Order.ability: Uses a unit ability via [slot_number, ability_index] where ability_index is 0-based.
Order.wfs: Waits for the spawn button using [0, mode] where mode=0 waits for appear and mode=1 waits until it disappears.
Order.wfw: Waits until a specific wave using [0, wave_number].
Order.wait: Waits a number of seconds using [0, seconds].
Order.end: Counts as a win/victory, usefull for things that restart the match. Just use [0,0] as arguments
Order.cid_number: Runs the full Cid Raid number-reading and tower activation routine using [0,0].

Unit Abilities.BASE_AUTO: Toggles auto-cast on the first ability button.
Unit Abilities.VSJW_SHADOW_A<1-0>_<B/S/H/E><1-4>: Summons a VSJW shadow, If A1 arise will be on, using priority type (B=Bear, S=Steel, H=Healer, E=Beru) and a number from 1-4.
Unit Abilities.PRIDEBURN_<slot>: Toggles Escanor's Prideburn for the specified slot number.
Unit Abilities.VALENTINE_x1,y1_x2,y2: Shift-clicks multiple coordinates (any amount) then presses Q.
Unit Abilities.BROOK: Runs Brook's buff loop until the buff successfully procs.
Unit Abilities.UMA_RACING: Runs the full UMA routine including mood check, rest cycle, and upgrades.
Unit Abilities.AINZ_SPELLS_<elements>: Opens Ainz's spell menu and selects the specified element levels.
Unit Abilities.AINZ_WORLDITEM_SCROLL_<target>_<x>_<y>: Uses Ainz's Scroll world item on a target at coordinates [x,y].
Unit Abilities.AINZ_WORLDITEM_OUROBOUROS_<val>_<stat>: Uses Ainz's Ouroboros world item with a value and a stat type (HP/Wave/Cost).
Unit Abilities.AINZ_WORLDITEM_CALORIC_<target>_<x>_<y>: Uses Ainz's Caloric Stone on a target and places it at coordinates [x,y].

Other.click: Performs a mouse click using [[x,y], button] where button=0 is left click and button=1 is right click.

Units.placements: Unit placements are defined as [x, y] world-space coordinates.
Units.upgrades: Unit upgrades use [placement_index, value] where value is a number, 'auto', or 'max'.
Units.abilities: Unit abilities use [placement_index, ability_name, wave_number_or_null] where wave_number_or_null determines when it triggers.
